reference: I had a back fusion two years ago and I'm still experiencing increased pain in my back and hip area. I had an MRI last week, which showed more changes in my back, but my concern is that they found a cyst on my right kidney. I have had four urinary tract infections and blood and protein in my urine lately. However, before knowing about the cyst, I had been having pains in that area. I am out of work due to the back surgery, and my primary care physician wanted me to see a urologist, but I cannot afford that right now. Should I be concerned about this? Also, when I was three years old, I had to have my urethra stretched and I have had many kidney issues and urinary tract infections while growing up.
